items.how_used: 论文使用蒙特卡洛方法模拟不同驾驶策略和场景，通过大量随机测试确定最优策略。
items.source_excerpt: We applied Monte Carlo and fluid dynamic methodologies to create a robust simulation and experimented with countless different scenarios.

items.how_used: 将交通流类比为流体，修改Darcy-Weisbach方程以模拟非层流车辆向开放车道的流出，用拥堵度类比压力。
items.source_excerpt: The Darcy-Weisbach equation, which models the outflow of laminar fluid towards an opening, was modified for our purposes to accurately model the analogous outflow of non-laminar cars towards an opening -- the unblocked lane.

items.how_used: 论文结构遵循IMRaD格式，包含Introduction、Assumptions、Model、Results、Implications、Strengths and Weaknesses、Conclusion等部分。
items.source_excerpt: Contents: 1 Introduction, 2 Assumptions, 3 Model, 4 Model Results, 5 Implications of Model, 6 Strengths and Weaknesses, 7 Conclusion

items.how_used: 论文列出7条假设，每条假设有编号和详细理由，如所有司机看到标志、理解规则、驾驶风格可分类等。
items.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: All drivers see the first sign and acknowledge its presence. Justification: ...

items.how_used: 论文通过图表对比不同策略（如拥堵平衡策略）下的通行时间和愤怒指数，展示模型结果。
items.source_excerpt: We found that a congestion-balancing strategy ... reduced his transit time by 8% and overall driver anger decreased by 10%.

items.how_used: 论文测试了不同速度限制（35和65 mph）、车道数（2车道和3车道）、标志距离等参数对结果的影响。
items.source_excerpt: This strategy proved most effective both on two-lane and three-lane scenarios, with both 35 and 65 mph speed limits.

items.how_used: 论文使用Java编写模拟程序，包含道路、车辆对象，实现不同驾驶策略的仿真。
items.source_excerpt: Our model was primarily a Java simulation, comprising the given road with a lane closure, and populated with car objects.

items.how_used: 论文在Implications部分讨论了策略的公平性、卡车影响、标志距离、博弈论含义等，并提出推广建议。
items.source_excerpt: Based on our findings, we developed guidelines to include in the DMV driver education materials, so that our conclusions ... can be implemented on a larger scale to improve traffic flow.
